Le Mas · Beaucaire

The whole Mas

The whole estate, just for you.
20guests
8bedrooms
2pools
—on request
+ 1 photos

For the big occasions, the whole Mas des Prépresses can be booked exclusively: the three houses together, two pools, the grounds, century-old plane trees and views over the countryside.

Up to twenty guests, eight bedrooms: weddings, reunions, retreats or big family holidays find a rare setting here. A tailor-made arrangement, direct with the owners.
